name: SMB Signing Not Required
description: SMB signing is not enforced allowing potential man-in-the-middle attacks.
impact: Attackers may intercept or modify SMB traffic.
recommendation: Enable SMB signing via Group Policy.

name: SMBv1 Enabled
description: Legacy SMBv1 protocol is enabled and vulnerable to multiple exploits.
impact: Remote code execution and worm propagation possible.
recommendation: Disable SMBv1 and upgrade to SMBv2 or SMBv3.

name: MS17-010 EternalBlue
description: The SMBv1 server is vulnerable to EternalBlue exploit.
impact: Attackers can gain full remote system compromise.
recommendation: Apply Microsoft patch MS17-010 and disable SMBv1.

name: Unsupported Windows OS
description: The operating system is no longer supported by the vendor.
impact: No security patches will be released making the system vulnerable.
recommendation: Upgrade to a supported version of Windows.

name: SNMP Public Community
description: SNMP service is accessible using default community string public.
recommendation: Change SNMP community strings and restrict access.

name: SNMP Private Community
description: SNMP service allows write access using default community string.
recommendation: Change SNMP community strings and restrict access.

name: SNMP Reflection DDoS
description: SNMP service may be abused for reflection amplification attacks.
impact: System could be used in DDoS campaigns.
recommendation: Restrict SNMP access via firewall rules.

name: TLS 1.0 Enabled
description: The server supports deprecated TLS 1.0 protocol.

name: TLS 1.1 Enabled
description: The server supports deprecated TLS 1.1 protocol.

name: SSLv2 Enabled
impact: Attackers may decrypt traffic using known attacks.

name: SSLv3 Enabled
description: SSLv3 protocol is vulnerable to POODLE attack.

name: Weak SSL Cipher Suites
impact: Encryption may be broken by attackers.
recommendation: Disable weak ciphers and enforce strong encryption.

name: SSL Self Signed Certificate
impact: Users cannot verify authenticity of server.

name: SSL Certificate Wrong Hostname
impact: Users may be exposed to MITM attacks.

name: Cross Site Scripting Reflected
impact: Attackers can execute scripts in browser.

name: Cross Site Request Forgery
impact: Attackers may perform actions as victim.

name: SQL Injection
impact: Attackers may access or modify database.

name: NTP Monlist Enabled
impact: System may be used for amplification attacks.

name: Weak File Permissions
description: Files accessible by low privilege users.

name: Weak Registry Permissions
description: Registry writable by low privilege users.
